recommendations.title: Caramelo
recommendations.overview: After a life-changing diagnosis, a promising chef finds hope and humor with the help of a fur-midable dog friend.

recommendations.title: Pollyanna
recommendations.overview: A young girl comes to an embittered town and confronts its attitude with her determination to see the best in life.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.

recommendations.title: Family Guy Presents: Blue Harvest
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: With the Griffins stuck at home during a blackout, Peter tells the story of "Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope".
recommendations.director: Peter Shin, James Purdum, Dominic Polcino

recommendations.title: Roman Holiday
recommendations.overview: Overwhelmed by her suffocating schedule, touring European princess Ann takes off for a night while in Rome. When a sedative she took from her doctor kicks in, however, she falls asleep on a park bench and is found by an American reporter, Joe Bradley

recommendations.title: Mamma Mia!
recommendations.overview: A spirited young bride-to-be living with her single mother on a small Greek island secretly invites three of her mother's ex-boyfriends in hope of finding her biological father to walk her down the aisle.

recommendations.title: My Name Is Loh Kiwan
recommendations.overview: After defecting from North Korea, Loh Kiwan struggles to obtain refugee status in Belgium, where he encounters a dejected woman who has lost all hope.

recommendations.title: S.F.W.
recommendations.overview: An alienated and misanthropic teenager gains sudden and unwanted celebrity status after he's taken hostage by terrorists where his indifference to their threats to kill him makes news headlines.
